title: Insurance Premium Levy (Amendment) Act, 2024

sections.title: Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the— Amendment
sections.body:
of section 2
(a) deletion of the definition of “electronic fiscal device”;
and
(b) insertion of the following new definition in the appropriate
place in alphabetical order:
“electronic invoicing system” has the meaning
assigned to the words in the Value Added Tax Act;. Cap.331

sections.title: Section 4 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion of Amendment
sections.body:
of section 4
subsection (3) and the substitution therefor of the following:
(3) An insurer, an insurance agent or a broker shall use
an electronic invoicing system to record a payment of the
levy and issue a tax invoice generated by the electronic
invoicing system to a person that pays the levy.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 4 each.
404
